title: Early closure for Thomson-East Coast Line due to Stage 4 works

title_translations.zh-Hans: 汤申东海岸线因第四阶段工程提前关闭
title_translations.ms: Penutupan awal Laluan Thomson-East Coast kerana kerja-kerja Peringkat 4
title_translations.ta: தாய்-கிழக்கு கடற்கரை பாதைக்கான ஆரம்ப மூடல், நிலை 4 பணிகளுக்காக

updates.text: From 3 November 2023 to 28 January 2024, services on the Thomson-East Coast Line will end earlier at 11.30pm on Fridays and Saturdays, except on Deepavali eve on 11 November 2023 when there will not be an early closure.
